jd_text:
Location: UAEReporting to: Group CEO
About the Company:Our client is a high-growth, diversified automotive and mobility group with a strong international footprint across the Middle East, Africa, Asia, Europe, and South America.Having achieved rapid expansion across multiple business lines – including automobile trading, mobility solutions, and adjacent sectors – the Group is now entering a phase of structured, professional scale-up, with a clear ambition to significantly grow and achieve IPO readiness over the medium term.
The Role:We are seeking a dynamic, hands-on CFO to lead the finance function through its next stage of evolution.This is a transformational role, combining operational leadership with strategic influence – focused on building robust financial systems, enhancing governance, and supporting accelerated growth across geographies.
Key Responsibilities:Lead the end-to-end finance function, including FP&A, controllership, treasury, and taxConduct a comprehensive review of existing systems and processes, and implement scalable structures and controlsDrive the selection and implementation of a Group-wide ERP platformEstablish strong financial governance, compliance, and reporting frameworksPartner with senior leadership to support strategic planning, performance management, and expansion initiativesPrepare and present Board-level financial reports and insightsLead and develop the finance team, while overseeing Shared Services operations overseas
Candidate Profile:Professionally qualified (CA / CPA / ACCA or equivalent)Strong foundation in Big 4, combined with experience in multinational organizationsProven exposure to multi-country trading environments, ideally within the GCCDemonstrated success in finance transformation, systems implementation, and scaling businessesExperience in automotive / trading / import-export sectors is advantageousA hands-on, commercially minded leader with strong interpersonal and stakeholder management skills
Additional Considerations:The role involves oversight of an international Shared Services function and will require regular travel to PakistanSuccess in this role will require the ability to introduce structure and financial discipline while operating effectively within a fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment
Why This Opportunity:This is a unique opportunity to join a rapidly scaling international business at a pivotal stage, and to play a defining role in shaping its transition into a globally recognized, institutionally governed organization.
